field_notes.generation_entropy: Solver uncertainty at time of terrain WFC — fixed at generation time.
field_notes.epistemic_fog: Player knowledge state — distinct from generation_entropy.  Never collapse these.
field_notes.receipt_hash: Populated only by ledger_init.py or later receipt operations.  null during worldgen.
field_notes.owner_house_id: Populated only after CLAIMED receipt.  null during generation.
